values.description: Base URL for the locally running SQL-enabled image
Admin URL (same host, port 444 -- log cache uses /rest/logs)
Sender token from: docker run --rm -e XFORM_JWT_SECRET=<secret> <image> generate-token
Admin token from generate-token (includes xform-sender + admin roles)
Last name of a patient that EXISTS in your mounted CSV
Date of birth (YYYY-MM-DD) matching test_patient_family in your CSV
_lastUpdated filter that should return at least one record from your CSV
